title: Data Engineer - AI
company_focus: Technology consulting and data engineering services
description:
We need a self-driven, curious, and adaptable individual who
quickly picks up new tools and delivers outcomes. Strong SQL
proficiency is a must, along with an excellent understanding
of dimensional modeling, data integration, data securit/
governance, and a foundational understanding of Generative
AI. Below are the basic skill expectations:

- Very Strong SQL skills for data extraction, transformation,
  and metric creation.
- Working understanding of data modeling concepts (dimensions,
  facts, hierarchies).
- Knowledge of data validation and profiling principles.
- Should be able to work on system integrations with various
  external tools - AD, Jira, Service Now etc.
- Eagerness to learn new technologies quickly.
- Foundational understanding of Generative AI models, LLMs,
  MCP and prompt engineering.
- Exposure to APIs, basic Python or scripting for automation.
- Good communication and analytical thinking skills.
- Collaborative mindset focused on helping the broader team
  succeed.
- Good to have: Understanding of document stores (e.g.,
  MongoDB)
responsibilities: Design and build data models using dimensional modeling concepts (dimensions, facts, hierarchies)
Extract, transform, and create metrics using advanced SQL
Implement data validation and profiling across data pipelines
Build and manage system integrations with external tools such as Active Directory, Jira, and ServiceNow
Automate tasks using basic Python scripting and APIs
Apply data security and governance principles to data workflows
Leverage foundational Generative AI knowledge including LLMs, MCP, and prompt engineering to support team initiatives
use_cases: Data integration across enterprise systems (AD, Jira, ServiceNow)
Automated data extraction and transformation pipelines
Enterprise data modeling and metric creation
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a Data Engineer role that requires foundational
knowledge of GenAI/LLMs but is primarily focused on data
engineering tasks—SQL, dimensional modeling, data
integration, and system integrations. The AI knowledge is
supplementary rather than the core responsibility, making
this an ai-support role.
